title: Re-order boards in Connected boards widget on Item card
excerpt:
I would like to be able to change the order of boards in the Connect boards widget within the Item Card. 
My request is very similar to the one found in this link but specifically for the Connect boards widget.

posts.author: movement_monday (Matthew Mecca)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to be able to change the order of boards in the Connect boards widget within the Item Card.

My request is very similar to the one found in this link but specifically for the Connect boards widget.
